hooks.PreToolUse: python3 -c "import sys, json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get('tool_name',''); dangerous=['push --force', 'push -f', 'reset --hard', 'checkout .', 'restore .', 'clean -f', 'branch -D']; args=' '.join(d.get('tool_parameters', {}).get('command', '').split()[:2]); [sys.exit(f'BLOCK: {cmd} {args}') for rule in dangerous if rule in ' '.join(d.get('tool_parameters', {}).get('command', '').split())]" 2>/dev/null
